description_long: This is a beaded necklace composed of alternating oval and round beads, predominantly black with striking white stripes running lengthwise along the larger beads. The necklace features a central, slightly larger bead with a subtle greenish tint, adding a focal point to the design. The beads are strung together on a thin, likely metallic or nylon thread, and the necklace is secured with a small metallic clasp. The surface of the beads appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the piece a polished finish. The overall design is geometric and symmetrical, with a repeating pattern that creates a visually balanced appearance. This necklace would be suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear, adding a bold accent to the neckline.
description: A black and white striped beaded necklace with a central greenish bead and a metallic clasp, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and geometric symmetry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central greenish bead and the symmetrical arrangement of black and white striped oval beads.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the alternating pattern of oval and round beads and the subtle sheen of the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the metallic clasp and the continuity of the bead pattern around the necklace.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the thickness and curvature of the necklace, with the clasp partially visible.
